description: A chibi shinobi pet inspired by Pain, with orange hair, Rinnegan eyes, piercings, and an Akatsuki-style cloak. Hover triggers a one-shot Shinra Tensei jump with a black-and-white Rinnegan color shift and full-body burst.

sequence: Pain turns to a small rear three-quarter view
Pain shifts to a dark monochrome form with glowing purple Rinnegan eyes
Shinra Tensei bursts outward as a full-body ring and hides Pain
The ring lingers briefly, then fades with Pain already gone

outro.description: Return control after the Shinra Tensei ring fades.

fallback.description: Use the standard jumping row if the custom Shinra ring strip is unavailable.

shinraTensei.description: Pain jumps, turns to a small rear angle, shifts to a black-and-white form with glowing purple Rinnegan eyes, then disappears inside a full-body Shinra Tensei burst before the effect ends.
